import { Component } from '@angular/core'; import { HttpClient } from '@angular/common/http'; @Component({ selector: 'app-root', templateUrl: './app.component.html', styleUrls: ['./app.component.css'] }) export class AppComponent { title = 'Base-Front'; UrlBase: string = 'https://localhost:7276/api/' response: any; constructor(private http: HttpClient) { this.cargar(); } cargar() { this.http.get(this.UrlBase + "Weather?PostalCode=46025&Time=2026%2F06%2F16") .subscribe({ next: (respuesta) => { this.response = respuesta; }, error: (error) => { console.error('Error ', error); alert('Intenta de nuevo.'); }, }); } }
